message:
fix(import): move deferred deps outside retry loop, remove dead code

Three fixes from code review:

1. BUG: deferred_deps.push was inside the ID collision retry loop.
   On collision, deps were recorded with the old (never-created) ID,
   causing spurious "failed to add dependency" warnings in Phase 2.
   Moved to after the retry loop so only the final successful ID is used.

2. Removed dead blocked-by normalization at the add_dependency call site.
   type_str is already normalized to "blocks" earlier in the same block,
   so the second check could never match.

3. Removed redundant strip_markdown_checkbox_prefix call in
   split_dependency_content — the line variable already has checkboxes
   stripped by strip_markdown_list_prefix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
